overall.description: A cinematic fly-through of a dense cyberpunk industrial cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring massive holographic billboards and towering gritty megastructures. The camera smoothly navigates through a narrow urban canyon between industrial buildings under bright afternoon sunlight with atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk industrial district with massive holographic advertising

events.description: camera passes the large holographic billboard, revealing the deep urban canyon ahead

agents.ego_description: flying forward through the dense urban canyon at high altitude, passing close to a massive building-mounted billboard displaying 'BARGHEST'

entered.detail: massive building-mounted holographic display showing a woman's face with yellow 'BARGHEST' text
tall rusted industrial tower with multiple levels and construction cranes
large circular industrial fans mounted on the building facade emitting steam

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close aerial pass of a massive holographic billboard on an industrial building. The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow canyon between towering rusted megastructures, with steam vents and industrial machinery visible. The bright afternoon sun illuminates the gritty cyberpunk architecture as the billboard gradually moves toward the edge of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban canyon between massive megastructures

events.description: the holographic billboard exits the frame right, opening up the view of the canyon depth

agents.ego_description: continuing forward flight through the industrial canyon, revealing the converging perspective of the cityscape ahead

entered.detail: tall teal-colored industrial building with multiple ventilation grates and 'ARASAKA' style markings
tall cylindrical structure with vertical piping and industrial platforms

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the camera continues down the industrial canyon revealing a green industrial tower on the right and a prominent cylindrical structure in the distance. The canyon walls converge toward a vanishing point with construction cranes visible against the sky. The atmosphere remains hazy with industrial smoke drifting between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep industrial canyon with converging perspective toward distant towers

agents.ego_description: flying steadily deeper into the urban canyon toward the distant industrial complex, maintaining consistent altitude

entered.detail: detailed metal grating and industrial walkways attached to the building facade
cluster of tall industrial towers and structures visible at the canyon's end

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues the descent into the industrial canyon, with rusted metal walkways and scaffolding now visible on the right. The cylindrical tower looms larger in the center frame as the camera approaches, while the canyon walls create a strong converging perspective toward the distant industrial complex. Steam and smoke continue to drift through the warm afternoon light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent through a narrow industrial canyon that transitions from a close-up of vibrant holographic media to a deep perspective of gritty megastructures. It begins with a close pass of a massive holographic billboard on a rusted building, moving steadily forward as the bright afternoon sun illuminates steam vents and industrial machinery. As the billboard recedes from the frame, the camera continues deeper into the canyon, revealing a green industrial tower to the right and a prominent cylindrical structure emerging in the distance. The scene then shifts to a tighter perspective where rusted metal walkways and scaffolding line the walls, while construction cranes and drifting smoke frame the converging path. Finally, the camera closes in on the looming cylindrical tower, drawing the viewer further into the hazy, sun-drenched industrial complex.
